series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to child support orders, wage garnishments, and external wage assignments, except child support payment spreadsheets and deposit and withdrawal records for child support that are covered by PAY-01.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 1 year after order, garnishment, or wage assignment is paid/released., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
